user_story: As a user, I can open the Codex Merit Studio dashboard.
expected_behavior: Header, source panel, preview stage, output panel and run log render without horizontal overflow.
last_result: dashboard rendered without overflow

user_story: As a browser-preview user, I see a realistic initial merit card before native scan.
expected_behavior: Sample aggregate and sample outcomes render a complete card and metrics immediately.
last_result: sample preview covered by badge/unit evidence

user_story: As a user, I can edit the selected Codex root before scanning.
expected_behavior: Root input preserves the user-entered path and passes it to native scan.
last_result: root input retained edited value

user_story: As a user, I can click Scan all-time and see a loading scan before results.
expected_behavior: Scan button disables during scan, progress reaches 100%, and browser preview reports fixture scan complete.
last_result: scan all-time reached success and 100%

user_story: As a Mac app user, I can scan a selected Codex root.
expected_behavior: Tauri reads only selected root sqlite/state_5.sqlite and rollout JSONL files.
last_result: native scan source compiles under Cargo

user_story: As a user, I get message/tool/hour counts without transcript storage.
expected_behavior: JSONL parser counts user messages, assistant messages, tool calls and capped task durations only.
last_result: rollout parser unit gate passed

user_story: As a privacy-sensitive user, out-of-root rollouts are not read.
expected_behavior: Canonical path allowlist skips symlink/out-of-root rollouts and reports missing files separately.
last_result: filesystem allowlist covered by unit/source evidence

user_story: As a user, I can read sessions, exchanges, tool runs, hours and ratios.
expected_behavior: Dashboard side panels show aggregate counts and derived tool/exchange ratios.
last_result: metrics panels covered by rendered layout proof

user_story: As a user, I get a cool name based on my Codex usage profile.
expected_behavior: Manifest chooses profile name, subtitle and tier from hours, sessions, tool intensity and verified outcomes.
last_result: profile and tier logic covered

user_story: As a user, my public card never leaks local/private data.
expected_behavior: BadgeManifest excludes prompts, responses, local paths, thread IDs, emails, secrets and store identities.
last_result: public manifest privacy covered by doctor/unit gates

user_story: As a user, I can enter a profile URL or @handle for the QR code.
expected_behavior: Input normalizes @handles/domains/http URLs, rejects unsafe values and updates the rendered QR metadata.
last_result: custom profile URL rendered into QR metadata

user_story: As a viewer, I can scan the profile QR from the exported card.
expected_behavior: QR is URL-backed, enlarged, has a four-module quiet zone and is embedded in the security label.
last_result: QR size and quiet zone covered

user_story: As a sharer, I get a premium 1:1 merit-token image.
expected_behavior: SVG is deterministic, square, has holographic edge, security glyph and no old rank badge.
last_result: holographic square token visual verified

user_story: As a user, export actions only enable after PNG generation is ready.
expected_behavior: 4K PNG export cache is prepared with bounded render time before Save/Copy buttons are enabled.
last_result: export cache and bounded render evidence present

user_story: As a web preview user, clicking Save as PNG writes a real 4K PNG when file picker exists.
expected_behavior: showSaveFilePicker receives an image/png blob with 4096x4096 dimensions and closes the writable stream.
last_result: browser save wrote a 4096 PNG blob

user_story: As a web preview user, blocked save actions show an honest fallback.
expected_behavior: If no file picker exists, status is error-like and Download/Open fallback links appear.
last_result: blocked browser save exposes fallback links

user_story: As a web preview user, clicking Copy Image copies a real image.
expected_behavior: Clipboard success is claimed only when navigator.clipboard contains image/png; success shows no fallback panel.
last_result: browser copy writes image/png and no success fallback

user_story: As a web preview user, blocked clipboard actions show an honest fallback.
expected_behavior: If direct PNG clipboard is blocked, status explains the block and exposes PNG fallback links.
last_result: blocked browser copy exposes fallback links

user_story: As a Mac app user, Save as PNG opens a native save sheet.
expected_behavior: Tauri save command prompts for a filename and writes the selected PNG path.
last_result: native save command compiles under Cargo

user_story: As a Mac app user, Copy Image copies a PNG to the macOS clipboard.
expected_behavior: Tauri clipboard command writes PNG data through macOS clipboard integration.
last_result: native clipboard command compiles under Cargo

user_story: As a Mac app user, I can open a saved PNG in Preview.
expected_behavior: Saved native PNG can be opened with Preview through the Tauri command.
last_result: native Preview command compiles under Cargo

user_story: As a user, I only see Save as PNG and Copy Image as primary export actions.
expected_behavior: Copy Caption and Reveal in Finder controls are absent from the UI.
last_result: old export actions absent

user_story: As a user, only verified manual outcomes affect public wins/bugs/gates.
expected_behavior: Ledger parser strips dangerous text and only publicSafe entries contribute to manifest metrics.
last_result: ledger publicSafe and redaction covered

user_story: As a privacy-sensitive user, local exports are checked before release.
expected_behavior: Doctor proves no forbidden public data, no network APIs and no browser persistence in the badge app.
last_result: privacy doctor passed

user_story: As a user, exported PNGs are exact square assets.
expected_behavior: Visual QA emits 1080x1080 and 4096x4096 PNGs without alpha and deterministic renderer parity.
last_result: visual export QA passed for 1080 and 4096

user_story: As a maintainer, I can replay the critical user path.
expected_behavior: Browser QA verifies root input, scan, custom QR URL, Save success, Copy success, blocked fallbacks and no overflow.
last_result: browser interaction QA passed

user_story: As a maintainer, I can prove the web app build is healthy.
expected_behavior: codex-badge build runs privacy doctor, unit tests, typecheck and Vite build.
last_result: codex-badge build passed

user_story: As a maintainer, I do not claim a DMG without Rust/Tauri proof.
expected_behavior: DMG script builds a local disk image or fails before any ready claim.
last_result: DMG build produced an installable disk image

user_story: As a maintainer, the loop contract matches the current product.
expected_behavior: Loop manifest references 4096 PNG artifacts, browser QA and an artifact budget compatible with 4K output.
last_result: loop manifest aligned with 4K/browser QA

user_story: As a maintainer, badge gates are part of the workspace quality gate.
expected_behavior: quality-gate:evaluate includes badge doctor, tests and visual QA without claiming DMG readiness.
last_result: quality gate includes core badge gates
